title: ClickHouse — Service deep dive
description: Per-microservice drill-down over OTel logs+traces in ClickHouse (RFC-0019). Platform-wide RED lives in 'ClickHouse — OTel logs+traces SQL'.

list.name: service
list.label: Service
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT ServiceName FROM otel.otel_traces ORDER BY ServiceName

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT ServiceName FROM otel.otel_traces ORDER BY ServiceName

targets.rawSql: SELECT count()/(toUnixTimestamp($__toTime) - toUnixTimestamp($__fromTime)) AS rps FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = ${service:singlequote} AND SpanKind = 'Server'
SELECT 100.0*countIf(StatusCode = 'Error')/count() AS err_pct FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = ${service:singlequote} AND SpanKind = 'Server'
SELECT round(quantile(0.95)(Duration)/1e6, 1) AS p95_ms FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = ${service:singlequote} AND SpanKind = 'Server'
SELECT count() AS error_logs FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = ${service:singlequote} AND SeverityNumber >= 17
SELECT uniqExact(SpanName) AS ops FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = ${service:singlequote} AND SpanKind IN ('Server','Internal')

panels.title: Request rate by operation
panels.description: Server spans bucketed by $__timeInterval, one line per operation (route or RPC).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(Timestamp) AS time, SpanName, count() AS calls FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = ${service:singlequote} AND SpanKind = 'Server' GROUP BY time, SpanName ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(Timestamp) AS time, round(quantile(0.50)(Duration)/1e6,2) AS p50_ms, round(quantile(0.95)(Duration)/1e6,2) AS p95_ms, round(quantile(0.99)(Duration)/1e6,2) AS p99_ms FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = ${service:singlequote} AND SpanKind = 'Server' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(Timestamp) AS time, 100.0*countIf(StatusCode = 'Error')/count() AS err_pct FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = ${service:singlequote} AND SpanKind = 'Server' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(Timestamp) AS time, SeverityText, count() AS lines FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = ${service:singlequote} GROUP BY time, SeverityText ORDER BY time

panels.title: Routes — calls, 5xx, latency
panels.description: HTTP server spans only. Keys are the v1.41 names: http.request.method / http.route / http.response.status_code.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SpanAttributes['http.request.method'] AS method, SpanAttributes['http.route'] AS route, count() AS calls, countIf(toUInt16OrZero(SpanAttributes['http.response.status_code']) >= 500) AS resp_5xx, round(quantile(0.95)(Duration)/1e6,2) AS p95_ms FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = ${service:singlequote} AND SpanKind = 'Server' AND mapContains(SpanAttributes, 'http.request.method') GROUP BY method, route ORDER BY calls DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT $__timeInterval(Timestamp) AS time, concat(toString(intDiv(toUInt16OrZero(SpanAttributes['http.response.status_code']), 100)), 'xx') AS class, count() AS c FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = ${service:singlequote} AND SpanKind = 'Server' AND mapContains(SpanAttributes, 'http.response.status_code') GROUP BY time, class ORDER BY time

panels.title: gRPC surface (rpc.method — new-mode semconv, no rpc.service)
RPCs served — calls, errors, latency
panels.description: gRPC server spans. rpc.method holds the full package.Service/Method (otelgrpc new mode); health/reflection RPCs are filtered at the SDK.

targets.rawSql: SELECT splitByChar('/', SpanAttributes['rpc.method'])[1] AS rpc_service, splitByChar('/', SpanAttributes['rpc.method'])[2] AS rpc, count() AS calls, countIf(StatusCode = 'Error') AS errors, round(quantile(0.95)(Duration)/1e6,2) AS p95_ms FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = ${service:singlequote} AND SpanKind = 'Server' AND mapContains(SpanAttributes, 'rpc.method') GROUP BY rpc_service, rpc ORDER BY calls DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT $__timeInterval(Timestamp) AS time, splitByChar('/', SpanAttributes['rpc.method'])[2] AS rpc, count() AS calls FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = ${service:singlequote} AND SpanKind = 'Server' AND mapContains(SpanAttributes, 'rpc.method') GROUP BY time, rpc ORDER BY time

panels.title: Who calls $service
panels.description: Client spans from other services whose rpc.method targets this service's proto package (<service>.v1.*).

targets.rawSql: SELECT ServiceName AS caller, SpanAttributes['rpc.method'] AS rpc, count() AS calls, countIf(StatusCode = 'Error') AS errors, round(quantile(0.95)(Duration)/1e6,2) AS p95_ms FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND SpanKind = 'Client' AND ServiceName != ${service:singlequote} AND SpanAttributes['rpc.method'] LIKE '${service:raw}.v1.%' GROUP BY caller, rpc ORDER BY calls DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: What $service calls
panels.description: Outbound client spans of this service; the proto package's first segment names the callee.

targets.rawSql: SELECT if(mapContains(SpanAttributes, 'rpc.method'), splitByChar('.', SpanAttributes['rpc.method'])[1], 'http') AS callee, if(mapContains(SpanAttributes, 'rpc.method'), SpanAttributes['rpc.method'], SpanName) AS operation, count() AS calls, countIf(StatusCode = 'Error') AS errors, round(quantile(0.95)(Duration)/1e6,2) AS p95_ms FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = ${service:singlequote} AND SpanKind = 'Client' GROUP BY callee, operation ORDER BY calls DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Slow & failing — click a TraceId to open the trace

targets.rawSql: SELECT Timestamp, TraceId, SpanName, round(Duration/1e6,2) AS ms, StatusCode FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = ${service:singlequote} AND SpanKind = 'Server' ORDER BY Duration DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT Timestamp, TraceId, SpanName, SpanKind, round(Duration/1e6,2) AS ms FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = ${service:singlequote} AND StatusCode = 'Error' ORDER BY Timestamp DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Logs (zapx → otelzap: lowercase severity, Body = message)

targets.rawSql: SELECT Timestamp, SeverityText, Body, TraceId, LogAttributes['path'] AS path, LogAttributes['status'] AS status, LogAttributes['code'] AS grpc_code, LogAttributes['duration'] AS duration FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = ${service:singlequote} AND $__conditionalAll(SeverityText IN (${severity:singlequote}), $severity) ORDER BY Timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT Body, count() AS occurrences, max(Timestamp) AS last_seen FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = ${service:singlequote} AND SeverityNumber >= 17 GROUP BY Body ORDER BY occurrences DESC LIMIT 15

panels.title: Error traces with correlated logs (cross-signal JOIN)
panels.description: One store, one JOIN: each failing trace with how many log lines it correlates to.

targets.rawSql: SELECT t.TraceId AS TraceId, any(t.SpanName) AS operation, round(max(t.Duration)/1e6,2) AS ms, count(DISTINCT l.Timestamp) AS log_lines FROM otel.otel_traces t ANY LEFT JOIN otel.otel_logs l ON t.TraceId = l.TraceId WHERE $__timeFilter(t.Timestamp) AND t.ServiceName = ${service:singlequote} AND t.StatusCode = 'Error' GROUP BY t.TraceId ORDER BY ms DESC LIMIT 15
